themes.title: Payment Reliability
themes.description: Enhancing the reliability of payment processing to ensure a seamless checkout experience.

themes.title: User Experience Enhancements
themes.description: Improving user experience through features that simplify the checkout process.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete critical reliability improvements for payment processing.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve a payment retry reliability rate of 99% and reduce payment failure rate by 50%.

milestones.name: V1 Completion
milestones.description: Implement user experience enhancements and coupon features.
milestones.success_criteria: Increase user satisfaction score by 20% and improve conversion rate by 15%.

sequencing.reason: V1 enhancements depend on the successful completion of MVP reliability improvements.

mvp.goal: Establish a reliable payment processing foundation.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience and implement additional features.

v2.goal: Further improve features based on user feedback and testing.
